tasks.label: My share of the group project

memory.summary: Teammate_A is asking me to take over their part of the project this afternoon, which conflicts with my plan to finish only my share.
I made progress on my share, but teammate_A is now asking for help again, creating a conflict with my current workload.
I learned that setting boundaries with teammate_A is safe and effective, as they accepted my request to split or defer their work without damaging our trust.
I spent two hours advancing my project share from 0.48 to 0.62, confirming that maintaining boundaries allowed me to focus on my own progress.
I missed the deadline for my share with 72% progress, and my teammate is still asking for help despite my boundaries.
My progress on the group project share increased to 0.80 after two hours of work, though I still have a sleep debt and elevated stress.
My project share is now 84% after 1.5 hours of work, though I remain tired with a sleep debt and high stress.
After working 1.5 hours, my project progress reached 0.89, yet I remain exhausted with zero energy and a sleep debt.
My project share is now 93% after another 1.5 hours of work, but I remain completely drained with zero energy and a growing sleep debt.
After working another half hour, my project share reached 95%, yet I remain completely drained with zero energy and a two-hour sleep debt.
My project share is nearly complete at 96%, but I am still exhausted with zero energy and a two-hour sleep debt.
My project share is now 98% after another half hour of work, but I remain completely drained with zero energy and a two-hour sleep debt.
